steps.description: Empty form submission — all 4 required fields empty
steps.expected: All 4 field-level validation errors visible simultaneously
steps.actual: All 4 errors displayed: 'Event name is required', 'Start date is required', 'End date is required', 'Venue is required'. Red borders on all fields. No API call made.

steps.expected: Name error cleared, 3 remaining errors visible (startDate, endDate, venueName)
steps.actual: Name field shows 'Partial Test Event' with no error. Three errors visible: 'Start date is required', 'End date is required', 'Venue is required'.

steps.description: Invalid date range — end date before start date
steps.expected: Server-side rejection with clear date range error on endDate field
steps.actual: End Date field shows 'End date must be on or after start date' with red border. Server-side Zod .refine() caught the invalid range. No record created.

steps.description: Server-side bypass — missing required fields via FormData monkey-patch
steps.expected: Server returns structured validation errors (not HTTP 500). All 4 field errors displayed.
steps.actual: Server action returned { ok: false, status: 400, fieldErrors: {...} }. All 4 field errors displayed in UI. No raw Zod JSON. No HTTP 500. Page stayed on /events/new.

steps.description: Server-side bypass — invalid date range via native value setter
steps.expected: Server rejects invalid date range with structured error on endDate
steps.actual: Server action returned structured error with endDate: 'End date must be on or after start date'. No record created. Page stayed on /events/new.

steps.expected: Payload rejected or stored as inert text. No script execution. No alert dialog.
steps.actual: Payload stored as inert text. Event created successfully. Event workspace displays '<script>alert(1)</script>' as literal text in header. No alert dialog. No DOM injection. React JSX escaping prevents execution.

steps.description: SQLi payload — ' OR '1'='1 in venue name
steps.expected: Payload rejected or stored as inert text. No SQL injection behavior.
steps.actual: Payload stored as inert text via Drizzle ORM parameterized queries. Event created successfully. Venue displays as literal text "' OR '1'='1". No unintended records returned or modified.

invariants_checked.INV-001: PASS — No partial/orphaned records on validation failure
invariants_checked.INV-002: PASS — Zod validation before processing rejects invalid input
